summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of OrthoConnect ethical orthopaedic platform. All core features working correctly including home smart search with OSM map, surgeon OTP login and profile creation, admin dashboard for approval workflow, and conditions information pages.
passed_tests: Backend API health check and all 11 API endpoints
OTP request/verify flow with mocked OTP display
Home page smart search with results list and OSM map integration
Surgeon portal login and complete profile creation with 2 locations
Admin dashboard login and profile review/approval workflow
Conditions category navigation and detail pages with search integration
Document upload functionality and file management
All required data-testid attributes present for testing
